mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in nonfarm payrolls raises expected household income and corporate revenue growth, causing higher S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when PAYEMS growth is positive.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest available value before decision date was 135637 thousand
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month PAYEMS growth is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in 50% or fewer walk-forward observations, or if the return spread versus negative PAYEMS growth is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate signals weakening labor demand and deteriorating consumer income prospects, reducing expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest available value before decision date was 7.6 percent
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward cases or if mean triggered returns exceed unconditional mean returns.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation rises while the federal funds rate remains pinned near zero, real policy rates fall and liquidity supports equity valuation multiples, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS below 0.25 and CPIAUCSL up over 6 months
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest available value before decision date was 0.11 percent
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition of FEDFUNDS below 0.25 and rising CPIAUCSL does not produce higher 60-day returns than other periods, or if its walk-forward hit rate is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating retail sales indicate stronger household demand and near-term revenue momentum for listed firms, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days after the sales signal is observed.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest available value before decision date was 421147 million dollars
failure_condition: Reject if RSAFS 3-month growth crossings above 1.0 percent are followed by nonpositive average 5-day S&P 500 returns or by a hit rate below the unconditional hit rate.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production signals weakening manufacturing output and operating leverage pressure, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when INDPRO momentum turns negative.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest available value before decision date was 98.6709
failure_condition: Reject if negative 3-month INDPRO crossings are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if average triggered returns are not below baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A housing-starts upswing combined with improving payrolls confirms broad cyclical demand recovery, raising expected earnings growth and causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST 6-month growth positive and PAYEMS 3-month growth positive
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest available value before decision date was 853 thousand units
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive HOUST and PAYEMS condition fails to outperform periods with only one positive component, or if 60-day mean returns under the joint signal are nonpositive.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the federal funds rate from a low base tightens discount rates and reduces liquidity support for equities, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days after the rate increase.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS increases by at least 0.25 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest available value before decision date was 0.11 percent
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS increases of at least 0.25 percentage points over 3 months are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or average returns exceed baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Real activity acceleration across GDP, retail sales, and industrial production signals synchronized demand growth, improving earnings expectations and causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest quarterly growth positive, RSAFS 3-month growth positive, and INDPRO 3-month growth positive
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest available value before decision date was 13746.2 billions of chained 2017 dollars
failure_condition: Reject if the three-series positive activity condition has a 60-day return hit rate below 50% or does not outperform observations where at least one of the three activity series is negative.
